highlights.text: That was a little easier.  Perhaps you are growing more skillful?
returns home from a hard day of adventuring.
It seems you have died, my friend.
The soft feeling of serenity slowly dissipates from your mind.
Your close concentration on your movements fades away.
A soft feeling of serenity touches your mind, providing you with a clearer understanding of recent events.
Your sand elemental suddenly explodes with waves of blurry energy, causing a very localized quake right in your hand!
flaying at your hand with vicious speed!
Your body relaxes as your thoughts stray from the shadows.

knocking you painfully to the ground!

You begin to lose touch with your internal sources of strength.

ever-tighter vortex, sending out rings of sand in a tiny storm!

The residual strain on your mind of such intense focus on the shadows fades away.
You feel a strange sense of serenity and find that you are able to reflect on recent events with uncommon clarity and understanding.
Your internal strength fully recovers from your most recent attempt to tap into it.
The blinding snow and howling wind drives you out of hiding.
This pattern is familiar to you.
You feel refreshed enough to sacrifice another animus.
enhanced comprehension of arcane mysteries slips away.

The flame beneath it flickers briefly, but then dies down.

The flame beneath it quickly flares up wildly, bringing the contents to a rolling boil.
The glass alembic begins to shake violently as the pressure within it builds.
Your recent adventures echo powerfully in your mind.

you once again feel ready to perform the Fury technique

ready to perform the Barrage technique.
As abruptly as it began, the tailwind embracing you goes still.
You feel refreshed and ready to track again.
You suddenly feel the power of nature surround you.
Nature's blessing of vitality departs as your arcane prowess returns to normal.
A few withered tendrils of vine fall away from you, taking their gift of strength with them.
You begin to feel a strange fatigue, spreading throughout your body.
The strange lassitude is growing worse, making it difficult to keep up with any strenuous activities.
You find yourself gradually slowing down, your muscles trembling with fatigue.
It's getting increasingly difficult to move. It feels almost as if the air itself is growing thick as molasses.
No longer able to fight this odd paralysis, you collapse to the ground, as limp as an old washrag.
With a shaky gasp and trembling muscles, you regain at least some small ability to move, however slowly.
Although you can't seem to move as quickly as you usually can, you're feeling better than you were just moments ago
Fine coordination is difficult, but at least you can move at something close to your normal speed again.
While you're still a bit shaky, your muscles are responding better than they were.
Your body begins to respond normally again.
The vitality of nature bestows you with a burst of strength!
Thin tendrils of vine twine around you, instilling you with their strength.
Strength surges into you from your vine!
The vigor of your vine surges through you, imparting the strength leached from your foe.
A runner from your vine brushes against you and you feel strengthened by the contact.
settles to the ground and begins to dissipate.

motes of light encompass his body.

unwillingly drawn into the corporeal plane!

The world rights itself as your strength returns in a rush, the untamed wildness ebbing from your body.
